description: Vite-first SSR webapp baseline with explicit Node server entrypoint

notes: Generates a Vite-first SSR baseline with explicit client/server entries.
Production startup stays a direct Node server entrypoint via server/index.ts.
Scripts include dev:ssr, build:ssr, and start:ssr for template-local iteration.
TARGETS keeps SSR intent explicit with framework:vite for later planner wiring.
